research_notes: This is a research-mapping HYPOTHESIS plan, not an observed Tachibana trade on 600000.SH.
Q-LOCK-WAIT horizontal matrix points to wait_no_action as the only canonical method_action.
BUT rhythm_meaning=limited forces pm_required=true (see _pm_required_from_trial_row). So we add pm_action=lock_candidate to keep the dual-inventory context explicit on the PM ledger.

Semantic tension noted: method_action=wait_no_action has execution_replay_allowed=False in METHOD_ACTION_CATALOG, while we use execution_intent=replay_hypothesis_plan to advance the pipeline. This tension is real and deliberate — a human reviewer SHOULD decide whether to (a) keep this draft for pipeline continuity or (b) downgrade to execution_intent=audit_only and accept stopping at backtest_input_gate.
execution_event_type=lock_candidate matches the PM-layer event being declared, not a trade execution.
method_status=hypothesis: derived by analogy from Tachibana's own 1976-04-B dual-inventory wait segment. NO real Tachibana trade on 600000.SH.
